available_data_type: processed expression matrix, GSE72056_melanoma_single_cell_revised_v2.txt.gz, 75031245 bytes by HEAD check
key_labels: matrix header contains tumor; malignant(1=no,2=yes,0=unresolved); non-malignant cell type (T/B/Macrophage/Endothelial/CAF/NK codes); patient/tumor IDs are encoded in cell names
recommended_use: primary discovery scRNA-seq dataset for malignant versus non-malignant state definition and malignant cell-state reversal candidate discovery
limitation: no confirmed treatment-response label; processed normalized expression rather than raw count matrix in the checked file; gene-symbol-to-Ensembl mapping needed for Geneformer
download_status: not downloaded; URL and first matrix rows checked by ranged read only

sample_size: 31 melanoma tumors reported; 32 sample IDs parsed from downloaded annotation, needs manual confirmation
available_data_type: cell annotations downloaded; counts.csv.gz 51508919 bytes by HEAD check; TPM and count matrices available from GEO supplementary files
key_labels: downloaded annotation columns: cells, samples, cell.types, treatment.group, Cohort, no.of.genes, no.of.reads; cell.types include Mal/T.CD8/T.CD4/T.cell/B.cell/Macrophage/CAF/Endo./NK/?; treatment.group includes treatment.naive and post.treatment
recommended_use: external scRNA-seq validation dataset; secondary ICI-context malignant/immune ecosystem validation; better count-matrix candidate for Geneformer tokenization than TPM-only datasets
limitation: explicit responder/non-responder clinical outcome was not present in downloaded cell.annotations and needs manual confirmation from paper/supplement; sample count differs depending on tumor versus parsed sample ID definition
download_status: metadata downloaded to data_raw/metadata/GSE115978_cell.annotations.csv.gz; expression matrices not downloaded

disease: metastatic melanoma treated with immune checkpoint inhibitors
sample_size: 48 tumor biopsies from 32 patients reported; 48 patient/timepoint states parsed
cell_number: 16291 single immune cells confirmed after excluding protocol template rows
available_data_type: patient_ID metadata downloaded; TPM matrix available as GSE120575_Sade_Feldman_melanoma_single_cells_TPM_GEO.txt.gz, 126721504 bytes by HEAD check
key_labels: metadata includes patient ID/timepoint, response, therapy; response labels Responder/Non-responder; therapy labels anti-CTLA4, anti-PD1, anti-CTLA4+PD1
recommended_use: immunotherapy-response-related validation dataset for immune-state and response association; useful for checking whether candidate malignant reversal regulators relate to response-associated microenvironment
limitation: not a malignant-cell discovery dataset because cells are CD45+ immune cells; TPM matrix only in checked GEO processed file; cell-type cluster annotation beyond patient/response may require paper/supplement or re-clustering
download_status: metadata downloaded to data_raw/metadata/GSE120575_patient_ID_single_cells.txt.gz; TPM matrix not downloaded

disease: skin cutaneous melanoma / nevi and melanomas
available_data_type: GDC STAR - Counts gene expression quantification; 473 Gene Expression Quantification files by GDC API; clinical data available in GDC
key_labels: case submitter ID, primary/metastatic sample type, survival/stage/clinical variables; treatment response is not systematically available in standard TCGA clinical fields
recommended_use: TCGA-SKCM validation dataset for bulk expression, survival, stage, immune/malignancy deconvolution and candidate regulator prognostic association
limitation: bulk tissue lacks single-cell annotations; treatment-response validation is limited; tumor purity and immune composition confounding must be modeled

source: CancerRxGene / Sanger GDSC https://www.cancerrxgene.org/downloads; Sanger tool page https://www.sanger.ac.uk/tool/gdsc-genomics-drug-sensitivity-cancer/
disease: pan-cancer cell lines including melanoma subset
sample_size: melanoma-specific cell-line count needs manual confirmation for selected release
available_data_type: drug sensitivity metrics, cell-line annotations, expression/mutation/CNV resources depending on release
key_labels: cell line ID, tissue/cancer type, drug name, target/pathway, IC50/AUC or related sensitivity measures
recommended_use: GDSC validation resource for therapeutic vulnerability and candidate regulator-drug sensitivity association
limitation: cell lines are not patient tumors; release-specific melanoma subset must be filtered and recorded; no single-cell labels

source: DepMap portal https://depmap.org/portal/download/; DepMap downloads current release pages
disease: pan-cancer cell lines including melanoma lineage
sample_size: melanoma lineage model count needs manual confirmation for selected release
platform: CRISPR/RNAi dependency, expression, mutation, copy number, drug/compound response depending on release
available_data_type: gene effect/dependency, expression, mutation/CNV, lineage/model metadata, PRISM/compound sensitivity where available
key_labels: model ID, lineage, gene dependency score, expression, mutation/CNV, compound response
recommended_use: DepMap validation resource for genetic dependency and therapeutic vulnerability of candidate regulators
limitation: cell-line models; release/version drift; perturbation dependency is not equivalent to malignant-state reversal in patient tumors

platform: curated bioactivity assays and drug-target annotations
